subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath strengthened us to observe the Fast in the month of arising, wherein mankind arose for the worship of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ایدنا علی الصیام فی شهر القیام الذی قام فیه الناس لعباده الله
subcodes.subjects: @power of love, @Muhammad; Islam, @knowledge; recognition of God, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @law of fasting, @presence of; reunion with God
